description: These numbers work across all states in Nigeria. Always try these first.

forces.name: Nigerian Army — National HQ
forces.notes: 193 is the Nigerian Army toll-free emergency line. Army does not publish public phone numbers for individual divisions — contact via 112 or @HQNigerianArmy on X.

forces.name: Nigerian Army — Info & Operations
forces.source: Voice of Nigeria — official Army handles confirmed Oct 2025
forces.notes: Official Army information and operational updates account.

forces.name: Defence HQ Nigeria
forces.division: Armed Forces of Nigeria — Joint HQ
forces.notes: Joint armed forces headquarters. Handles multi-service operations.

forces.name: Nigeria Police — Complaint Response Unit (CRU)
forces.notes: 24/7 national complaint and emergency line. SMS/WhatsApp: 08057000003. For all 36 states.

forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — National HQ
forces.notes: National NPF account. Tag for urgent national-level incidents.

forces.name: NSCDC — Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps
forces.notes: 199 is NSCDC official 24/7 hotline (published on nscdc.gov.ng). 09029164164 is the direct incident report line. Both are from official NSCDC website.

forces.name: NPF Complaint Response Unit (CRU)
forces.notes: 24/7 complaint and emergency line. SMS/WhatsApp: 08057000003. Tag @PoliceNG_CRU on X.

forces.name: Nigerian Army — National HQ
forces.notes: 193 is the Nigerian Army toll-free emergency line. Army does not publish public phone numbers for individual divisions — contact via 112 or @HQNigerianArmy on X.

forces.name: Department of State Services (DSS/SSS)
forces.notes: Report terrorism, espionage, organized crime, separatist threats. NOT for everyday crime — use police for that.

forces.name: NEMA — National Emergency Management Agency
forces.source: nigerianqueries.com emergency helplines — compiled from official NEMA releases
forces.notes: Disaster response, flood, fire, humanitarian emergencies. Unverified numbers — confirm before use.

forces.name: Nigerian Red Cross Society
forces.notes: First aid, disaster response, humanitarian medical services.
